extension.summary: Watch (Live) TV and content from Ziggo GO (Netherlands)
Bekijk (Live) TV en content van Ziggo GO (Nederland)
extension.description: Watch (Live) TV and content from Ziggo GO (Netherlands). Subscription required.
Bekijk (Live) TV en content van Ziggo GO (Nederland). Abonnement vereist.
extension.news: v2.0.1 (2026-01-13) - Changed version 1 to have Kodi look and feel - During playing of a channel one can enter numeric keys to switch to another channel - Page up/down can be used to switch to next/previous channel - Channel list now displays information of the current event - Channel overview contains Next item - Home screen has a list of last used channels
v2.0.2 (2026-01-18) - Fixed issues with channel switching
v2.0.3 (2026-01-24) - Fixed issues with different skins, now we always have look and feel of skin.esturary - Fixed issues with recording not playing - Fixed issues with deleting recordings

v2.0.5 (2026-02-06) - Fixed error: Control nn was asked to focus but it can't - Fixed issues with recording of series without folder of series - performance improvements for recordings - Fixed issue with hang of Kodi during shutdownwhile playing video.

v2.0.6 (2026-02-11) - Fixed issue with channel not playing when switching channels during play from EPG by entering channel number - Delete seasons now also deletes the planned recordings of the season, and optionally also the booked and recorded episodes of the season
v2.0.7 (2026-02-15) - Fixed issue with refreshing recordings
v2.0.8 (2026-02-16) - Fixed issue with returning from play recordings
v2.0.9 (2026-03-07) - Updated the way recordings are deleted. When responding No to delete all recordings of a season, only individual episodes are deleted, and the season folder is kept.
v2.0.10 (2026-03-31) - Not all recordings contain a synopsis. Now shortsynopsys/synopsis is taken from season if missing and applicable.
v2.0.11 (2026-05-09) - Removed unused functions and code - Preparing for next Kodi version (22) using the new InputStream Adaptive API. Older version still supported. - URL for static images updated
v2.0.12 (2026-05-15) - Move some functions to the proxy server - Solved issue with testing via proxy-server - URL for static events updated
